Incident created from Interaction IMS1408584
comments: TOPS is a mainframe-based application system that consists of TOPS Online and TOPS Front End. It supports both ASO and FI medical policies; individual, small, key and national accounts. Its primary function is to process claims; however it does store some eligiblity, provider and authorization data (though TOPS is not the 'source' of this additional data). TOPS is a claims processing application that takes in claims (direct keyed or via UFE) into the TOPS Front End. Claims go through logic within the TOPS Front End for repricing, prepayment subrogation and attempts to auto-adjudicate. Those claims that cannot auto-adjudicate are dropped to a 'processing queue' (for COMET or TOPS Online) and are manually worked by a processor. Finalized claims are passed downstream to other applications (i.e. Payment Engine, FInancial Apps, Galaxy, DDS, etc.).
ai_rationale: Message states 'Adjustor Locked Out, Unable to login' which directly maps to account lockout under Identity & Access.
ai_root_cause: Account locked due to failed login attempts or security policy.

Incident created from Interaction IMS1408807
comments: TOPS is a mainframe-based application system that consists of TOPS Online and TOPS Front End. It supports both ASO and FI medical policies; individual, small, key and national accounts. Its primary function is to process claims; however it does store some eligiblity, provider and authorization data (though TOPS is not the 'source' of this additional data). TOPS is a claims processing application that takes in claims (direct keyed or via UFE) into the TOPS Front End. Claims go through logic within the TOPS Front End for repricing, prepayment subrogation and attempts to auto-adjudicate. Those claims that cannot auto-adjudicate are dropped to a 'processing queue' (for COMET or TOPS Online) and are manually worked by a processor. Finalized claims are passed downstream to other applications (i.e. Payment Engine, FInancial Apps, Galaxy, DDS, etc.).
ai_rationale: UNET unable to login is most consistent with an authentication/SSO problem.
ai_root_cause: Authentication failure (likely SSO/MFA) to UNET.
